questions.question: Does StudyPlanTab render study steps from topic content?
questions.actionable_check: Check StudyPlanTab.tsx renders topic.studyPlan.steps as StudyStep components with titles and tasks
questions.pass_criteria: Steps render with titles and task checklists visible

questions.question: Does each step show a per-step progress counter and progress bar?
questions.actionable_check: Check StudyStep component renders Progress component and completed/total counter
questions.pass_criteria: Each step shows completed/total count and a progress bar

questions.question: Can tasks be individually checked/unchecked via checkbox?
questions.actionable_check: Check Checkbox onChange calls onToggleTask with task.id
questions.pass_criteria: Clicking checkbox toggles task completion state

questions.question: Do completed task IDs persist across page refreshes?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test checks: check task, reload, task still checked
questions.pass_criteria: completedTaskIds written to lp_progress_v1 via writeTopicProgress, read on mount

questions.question: Does the overall progress bar show total completed/total tasks ratio?
questions.actionable_check: Check StudyPlanTab renders overall Progress with correct value calculation

questions.question: Is there an empty state when topic has no study plan?
questions.actionable_check: Check StudyPlanTab renders data-testid=study-plan-empty when studyPlan is empty
questions.pass_criteria: Empty state message shown when studyPlan.steps.length === 0

questions.question: Do completed steps show a Done badge?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test 3 checks Done badge appears when all tasks in a step are checked
questions.pass_criteria: Badge with text 'Done' appears when completedCount === totalTasks

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 5 Story 05 E2E tests pass?
Do all prior story tests still pass (no regressions)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run full Playwright suite: npx playwright test
